author: lOrm
content: Fixed in commit 3389b6b6 (src/hooks/mod.rs::fire_post_tool): replaced 'let _ = self.run(event, &input).await' with capturing the HookResult and iterating result.errors, emitting tracing::error! per error with structured event=, tool=, session_id=, hook_error_index=, error= fields. OWASP A09 audit trail restored. 2 regression tests added (failure + happy-path counter-test). cargo test --lib hooks::: 65 passed; clippy -- -D warnings: exit 0.
